title: archivist: fix jules-index to include resolved friction items 🗃️
summary: Fixes `cargo xtask jules-index` to include items from `.jules/friction/done/` in `FRICTION_ROLLUP.md` as required by the indexing specification.
proof_summary: Running `cargo xtask jules-index` successfully outputs a table populated with the previously excluded 12 items from `.jules/friction/done/`.
